rankings.reason: Captures the creative, immersive, and futuristic spirit of Tokyo culture better than the other functional descriptions.
Focuses well on high-tech efficiency and AI integration, though it lacks the narrative flair of Option B.
Provides a realistic user experience but feels more like a standard upgrade than a truly futuristic vision.
